title: ATC Acquires Aero Controls, Inc., Expanding Geographic Reach and Enhancing Specialized MRO Capabilities
summary: TULSA, Okla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Air Transport Components (ATC Group or the Company), a leading provider of component maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) services for the global aerospace industry, today announced the acquisition of Aero Controls, Inc. (ACI), an FAA-certified provider of specialized, precision-engineered component MRO services.
